host.description: Huawei RESTCONF HTTPS base URL, for example https://203.0.113.10:8447.

device_name.description: Default RESTCONF address-set namespace. Request.device_name takes precedence.

book_name.description: Default address group name. Request.book_name takes precedence.

user.description: Deprecated RESTCONF username fallback. Prefer secret.user or secret.username.

username.description: Deprecated alias for user. Prefer secret.user or secret.username.

skipTlsVerify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for private deployments.

headers.description: Optional additional HTTP headers merged before required Huawei headers.
